template.name: ODE_Model

location.name: id0
location.label: R0' == boundedRateR0() and R1' == boundedRateR1() and R2' == boundedRateR2() and R3' == boundedRateR3() and R4' == boundedRateR4()

transition.label: R0 = R0Init, R1 = R1Init, R2 = R2Init, R3 = R3Init, R4 = R4Init

query.formula: simulate [<=14400] { R2, R3, R4, R0, R1 } : false
